allow: Bash(node src/cli.js quick "CI matrix — GitHub Actions for Node 18/20/22, coverage, automated npm publish" --task-id T-103 --priority P2 --agent codex --root .)

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import pkg, { workspace } from 'agent-workflow-studio'; import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire\(import.meta.url\); const cjs = require\('agent-workflow-studio'\); console.log\('singleton:', workspace === cjs.workspace && pkg.workspace === cjs.workspace\)")
